message:
fix: audit batches 216-217 — 2 files fixed across 13 audited

Batch 216 (6698L, 6 files): ALL SOUND — lab/scenario.rs, lab/spork_harness.rs,
  trace/delta_debug.rs, http/body.rs, raptorq/proof.rs, lab/chaos.rs

Batch 217 (7305L, 7 files): distributed/snapshot.rs 1M (as u32 truncation in
  serialization — replaced with u32::try_from().expect()),
  raptorq/decision_contract.rs 1M (usize-to-u64 bit collision in ts_unix_ms
  — masked with & 0xFFFF_FFFF), server/connection.rs SOUND, server/shutdown.rs
  SOUND, http/compress.rs SOUND, combinator/laws.rs SOUND, types/outcome.rs SOUND

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
